somali.highlighted_phrases_are_potential_red_: 🚩 Weedhaha la iftiimiyay waa calaamado digniin oo suurtagal ah (qiyaas kaliya, ma aha xukun)—
somali.welcome_to_the_ai_literacy_lab: Ku soo dhawoow Makhadka Aqoonta AI
somali.this_is_a_six_section_lab_about_how_ai: Kani waa makhad lix qaybood ah oo ku saabsan sida AI dhab ahaantii u shaqeyso, halka ay ku fashilanto, iyo sida loo isticmaalo iyada oo aan la yeelin inuu sameeyo fikirka aad u baahan tahay inaad ku tababartid.
somali.six_sections_no_order_required_revisit: Lix qaybood, ma jiro nidaam loo baahan yahay. Dib u booqo mid kasta. Horumarkaaga waa la kaydiyaa.
somali.press_1_6_to_jump_sections_for_all_sho: Riix 1–6 si aad u boodo qaybaha, ? dhammaan habraacyada, T qoraalada macallinka.
somali.click_any_underlined_term: Guji erey kasta oo hoos ka xariiqan
somali.glossary_definitions_pop_up_inline_the: Qeexitaannada qaamuuska waxay ka soo baxaan safka. Qaamuuska buuxa wuxuu ku yaal masaafo hal badhan ah oo boodhka.
somali.the_live_demos_here_use_google_gemini_: Muujinta tooska ah halkan waxay isticmaalaan Google Gemini. Ha ku dhajin magacyo, lambarrada telefoonka ama wax gaar ah — amarrada waxaa laga yaabaa in uu duubo bixiyaha AI.
somali.see_tokens_next_token_prediction_and_t: Arag token, saadaasha token-ka xiga, iyo heerkulka oo shaqeynaya.
somali.a_gallery_of_real_feeling_ai_mistakes_: Bandhig khaladaadka AI oo dareen dhab ah leh, oo ay la socoto sida mid kasta u khiyaaneeyo dadka.
somali.weak_vs_strong_prompts_five_patterns_a: Amarrada daciifka ah iyo kuwa xoogga leh, shan qaab, iyo ku celcelin toos ah.
somali.12_phrases_identify_the_role_of_each_p: 12 weedhood. Mid kasta, dooro doorka uu ciyaaro (shaqsi / hawl / macnaha guud / qaab / tusaale / xaddid).
somali.click_the_wrong_parts_of_an_ai_generat: Guji qaybaha qaldan ee qoraalka AI abuuray.
somali.scaffold_vs_substitute_a_udl_framed_de: Taageero iyo beddel — qalab go'aan oo UDL loo qaabeeyay. Keen xaaladdaada.
somali.one_page_printable_summary_of_the_whol: Kooban hal bog oo la daabici karo oo makhadka oo dhan.
somali.this_clears_which_sections_you_ve_visi: Tani waxay nadiifisaa qaybaha aad booqatay, ku celcelinta amarrada aad kaydisay, iyo fikradaha UDL-kaaga. XP-ga aad ku kasbatay meel kale oo AlloFlow ah lama saameyn doono.
somali.the_ai_in_alloflow_is_not_magic_it_is_: AI-ga AlloFlow ma aha sixir — waa saadaaliyaha token-ka xiga oo lagu tababaray qoraal weyn. Makhadkan wuxuu tusayaa waxa uu dhab ahaantii sameynayo, goorta uu fashilmo, iyo sida loo isticmaalo iyada oo aan la yeelin inuu sameeyo fikirka aad u baahan tahay inaad ku tababartid.
somali.see_all_glossary_terms_in_one_place: Arag dhammaan erayada qaamuuska hal meel
somali.live_ai_calls_are_not_available_in_thi: Wicitaannada AI tooska ah lama heli karo deegaankan. Muujintu waxay isticmaali doontaa tusaalooyin la duubay.
somali.compare_outputs_at_different_temperatu: Isbarbardhig natiijooyinka heerkul kala duwan qaybta 1.
somali.write_or_run_3_prompts_in_the_section_: Qor ama socodsii 3 amar oo aqoonsiga qaybta 3.
somali.catch_every_error_in_a_section_4_passa: Qabo khalad kasta oo cutubka qaybta 4 iyada oo aan tilmaan lahayn.
somali.work_through_all_7_preset_scenarios_in: Ka shaqee dhammaan 7 xaaladood ee horay loo dejiyay qaybta 5.
somali.pass_all_5_comprehension_checks_one_pe: Guuleyso dhammaan 5 hubinta fahamka (mid qayb nuxur kasta).
somali.visit_every_section_including_the_quic: Booqo qayb kasta, oo ay ku jirto tixraaca degdegga ah.
somali.stuff_you_may_have_picked_up_that_is_n: — waxyaabaha aad qaadan karto oo aan gebi ahaanba saxsanayn
somali.powers_live_demos_here_it_is: wuxuu shidaa muujinta tooska ah halkan. Waa
somali.llm_among_many_chatgpt_claude_and_othe: mid ka mid ah LLM badan — ChatGPT, Claude iyo kuwo kale ayaa jira, mid kasta oo si ka duwan ugu dhaqma amar isku mid ah.
somali.they_don_t_know_events_after_it_ask_th: — ma yaqaanaan dhacdooyinka ka dib. Weydii AI si toos ah xadkiisa haddii aad u baahan tahay inaad ogaato su'aalaha nuglaanta wakhtiga.
somali.what_you_type_may_be_logged_by_the_ai_: Waxa aad qorto waxaa laga yaabaa in uu duubo bixiyaha AI.
somali.names_phone_numbers_medical_info_or_an: magacyo, lambarrada telefoonka, macluumaadka caafimaadka, ama wax kasta oo aadan ku qori doonin warqad uu qof qalaad akhrin karo.
somali.this_lab_is_about_text_ai_the_same_ide: Makhadkani wuxuu ku saabsan yahay AI qoraal. Fikradaha isku midka ah waxay khuseeyaan...
somali.they_hallucinate_hands_text_and_anatom: Waxay qardaaf ka sameeyaan gacmaha, qoraalka, iyo qaabdhismeedka jirka, sida moodallada qoraalku u qardaafaan xaqiiqooyinka. Eexda xogta tababarka waxay ka muuqataa waxa ay sawiraan.
somali.can_clone_voices_from_a_few_seconds_of: Way koobiyeyn karaan codadka dhawr ilbiriqsi oo duubis ah. Khataraha oggolaanshaha iyo deepfake way khuseeyaan.
somali.newer_and_even_more_convincing_than_de: Cusub oo xitaa qancin badan marka loo eego deepfake-yadii hore. U qaado in fiidyow kasta oo gaaban laga yaabo in la sameeyay.
somali.the_core_literacy_skills_check_sources: Xirfadaha aqoonta aasaasiga ah — hubinta ilaha, ogaanshaha marka codku aan la habboonayn hubinta, ula dhaqmidda natiijada sida qabyo-qoraal ma aha xaqiiqo — kuwan oo dhan waxay u gudbaan kuwan.
somali.written_by_a_clinician_psyd_with_stude: Waxaa qoray dhakhtar (PsyD) isagoo maskaxda ku haya ardayda leh kala duwanaanshaha shaqada fulinta, feejignaanta, iyo baridda. Miisaanka qiimeynta qaybta 5 waa qaybta ay manaahijta aqoonta AI badankood ka boodaan — waana kan ugu muhiimsan.
somali.your_prompt_or_the_model_s_own_previou: Amarkaaga ama natiijadii hore ee moodalka.
somali.split_text_into_small_pieces_tokens_wo: U kala qaybi qoraalka gabalado yaryar (token). Erayo, ereyo-hoosaad, calaamadaha hakinta.
somali.score_every_next_token: Dhibco sii token kasta oo xiga
somali.assign_a_probability_to_every_possible: U qoondee suurtagalnimo token kasta oo xiga oo suurtagal ah.
somali.temperature_picks_how_random_the_choic: Heerkulku wuxuu doortaa sida doorashadu u kala qaybsan tahay (eeg goobta ciyaaraha hoose).
somali.add_the_new_token_feed_it_back_in_do_t: Ku dar token-ka cusub. Dib u gali. Tan samee boqollaal jeer.
somali.everything_an_llm_does_is_a_loop_of_th: Wax kasta oo LLM sameyso waa wareeg tallaabooyinkan 5. Ma aha «fikir» — waa is-barbar dhig qaab oo token, mar iyo mar.
somali.the_newly_sampled_token_becomes_part_o: Token-ka cusub la doortay wuxuu noqdaa qayb ka mid ah gelinta tallaabada xigta. Hal jumlado natiijada AI waa boqollaal wareeg oo sidan ah.
somali.n_tokens_visible_at_once: N token oo hal mar la arki karo
somali.append_loop_until_stop: Ku dar → wareeg ilaa la joojiyo
somali.each_block_below_explores_one_of_these: Bloke kasta oo hoose wuxuu baarayaa mid ka mid ah tallaabooyinkan. Guji chip kasta si aad si toos ah u tagto.
somali.an_llm_never_sees_words_it_sees: LLM waligiis ma arko «erayo» — wuxuu arkaa
somali.which_are_pieces_of_words_type_a_sente: kuwaas oo ah gabalada erayada. Ku qor jumlad oo eeg sida loo kala qaybiyo.
somali.the_dog_was_running_quickly_because_it: Eyga wuxuu si dhaqso ah u ordayay sababtoo ah ma uu faraxsanayn.
somali.i_had_pizza_and_ice_cream_at_the_park_: Waxaan cunay pizza 🍕 iyo jalaato 🍨 beerta 🏞️ maanta!
somali.the_paleontologist_misidentified_the_p: Cilmi-baaraha fosillada wuxuu si qaldan u aqoonsaday dib been ah sida arthropod.
somali.why_this_matters: Sababta tani ay muhiim u tahay—
somali.the_model_predicts_the_next_token_not_: Moodalku wuxuu saadaaliyaa token-ka xiga, ma aha erayga xiga. Erayada gaagaaban ee caadiga ah waxay noqdaan hal token; erayada dhaadheer inta badan waa la kala qaybiyaa (tusaale Ingiriisi "unhappy" → "un" + "happy"). Biilashadu sidoo kale way u shaqeysaa sidan — kharashaadka API waxaa lagu xisaabiyaa token kasta, ma aha erey kasta.
somali.all_the_llm_is_really_doing_guessing_w: Wax kasta oo LLM dhab ahaantii sameynayo: qiyaasidda token-ka xiga wuxuu noqon doono. Marka la siiyo macnaha guud ee isku midka ah, wuxuu leeyahay suurtagalnimo token kasta oo xiga oo suurtagal ah.
somali.controls_how_random_the_next_token_cho: wuxuu xakameeyaa sida doorashada token-ka xiga u kala qaybsan tahay. Hoose (0.2) = ku dhawaad had iyo jeer wuxuu doortaa token-ka ugu suurtagalka badan. Sare (1.2) = wuxuu ka doortaa dabo dheer, oo ay ku jiraan token aan suurtagal ahayn. Amar isku mid ah, saddex heerkul—
somali.show_the_recorded_example_outputs_agai: Mar kale muuji natiijooyinka tusaalaha la duubay
somali.live_results_shown_above: ✅ Natiijooyinka tooska ah waa lagu tusay kor
somali.static_mode_recorded_examples_only: Qaab taagan — kaliya tusaalooyinka la duubay
somali.low_temperature_is_right_for_facts_wha: Heerkul hooseeya ayaa sax u ah xaqiiqooyinka ("Waa maxay caasimadda Faransiiska?"). Heerkul sare ayaa sax u ah shaqada hal-abuurka. Qalabka wada-hadalka AI badankood waxay dejiyaan bar meel dhexe — sababtaas awgeed su'aalaha xaqiiqada mararka qaarkood way lumaan.
somali.pick_any_temperature_and_any_prompt_ru: Dooro heerkul kasta iyo amar kasta. Si toos ah u socodsii. Kadibna socodsii amar isku mid ah heerkul kale oo isbarbardhig. 5 orodyada ugu dambeeya way muuqdaan si aad u aragto sida natiijadu ugu beddesho badhanka.
somali.live_ai_required_for_the_playground_th: AI toos ah ayaa loo baahan yahay goobta ciyaaraha — isbarbardhigga 3 ee horay loo dejiyay wuxuu isticmaalaa tusaalooyinka la duubay.
somali.llms_don_t_know_what_they_don_t_know_t: LLM ma ogaan waxa aanay garanayn. Waxay soo saaraan token-ka xiga ee ugu maqal la aamini karo, xitaa marka jawaabta la aamini karo ay khaldan tahay — tan waxaa loo yaqaan
somali.here_are_seven_failure_modes_every_stu: ). Halkan waa toddoba qaab oo fashil ah oo arday kasta ay tahay inuu aqoonsado.
somali.the_date_its_training_data_ends_anythi: — taariikhda uu xogta tababarkiisa ku dhammaado. Wax kasta oo ka dambeeya ma la garanayo, xitaa haddii moodalku sii socdo inuu si kalsooni leh u hadlo. Weydii—
somali.if_the_question_is_about_something_tha: Haddii su'aashu ku saabsan tahay wax laga yaabo inuu isbeddelo ama dhawaan dhacay, ha aaminin jawaabta AI iyada oo aan la haynin il web toos ah. Waxaad sidoo kale si toos ah u weydiin kartaa moodalka xadkiisa waa maxay — inta badan wuu yaqaan.
somali.why_hallucination_even_happens: Sababta qardaafku u dhaco gebi ahaanba
somali.the_llm_doesn_t_have_a_truth_step_it_h: LLM ma leh tallaabo «run». Wuxuu leeyahay tallaabo «la aamini karo». Habka isku midka ah ayaa soo saara jawaabaha saxda ah iyo kuwa khaldan labadaba — cod kalsooni isku mid ah.
somali.could_be_about_anything: Waxay ku saabsan tahay wax kasta.
somali.picks_likely_next_tokens_has_no_fact_c: Wuxuu doortaa token-ka xiga ee suurtagalka ah. Ma jiro hubin xaqiiqo.
somali.the_pattern_was_common_in_training_dat: Qaabku wuxuu caadi ku ahaa xogta tababarka sidaas darteed moodalku wuu dib u soo saaray (ma aha raadin — weli saadaal).
somali.fact_wasn_t_present_or_the_pattern_loo: Xaqiiqadu ma joogin, ama qaabku sax u ekaa laakiin ma uusan ahayn.
somali.both_paths_come_out_the_same_way_same_: Labada waddo waxay u soo baxaan si isku mid ah — cod kalsooni isku mid ah, jumlado siman isku mid ah. Kaliya habka lagu kala saaro waa in la hubiyo wax ka baxsan AI.
somali.same_prompt_three_different_models_rea: Amar isku mid ah, saddex moodal oo kala duwan. Si taxaddar leh u akhri — sayniska waa isku mid laakiin cod, dherer, iyo taxaddar way kala duwan yihiin. Haddii fasalkaagu ku tijaabiyo moodal, saaxiibkaana mid kale, waxaad heli doontaan jawaabo kala duwan labaduna "sax".
somali.length_varies_by_10_words_one_model_le: Dhererku wuxuu ku kala duwan yahay 10+ erey. Moodal ayaa ku bilaabmaya sharraxaad, kan kale saameyn muuqata. Mid ayaa si cad u odhan "dhererka mawjadda", kan kale "midabada". Midna kama saxsanaan — laakiin haddii aad u baahan tahay erey gaar ah hawl, moodalka aad doorato ayaa muhiim ah.
somali.recorded_examples_for_teaching_not_liv: Tusaalooyin la duubay barid, ma aha wicitaan toos ah. Wicitaannada tooska ah halkan waxay isticmaalaan Gemini kaliya.
somali.send_this_exact_question_to_gemini_rig: U dir su'aashan saxda ah Gemini hadda oo eeg waxa soo laabta
somali.compare_the_live_answer_to_the_canned_: Isbarbardhig jawaabta tooska ah iyo jawaabta horay loo diyaariyay kor.
somali.if_ai_confidence_tracked_correctness_t: Haddii kalsoonida AI ay raacdo saxnaanta, dhibcaha hoose waxay samayn lahaayeen xariiq weecsan. Taas beddelkeeda, ku dhawaad jawaab kasta oo AI waxaa loo akhriyaa kalsooni sare — sax ama khalad. Cod isku mid ah.
somali.scatter_plot_ai_confidence_on_the_x_ax: Jaantuska firdhinta: kalsoonida AI dhinaca x iyo saxnaanta dhinaca y. Jawaabaha badankood waxay isku ururaan kalsooni sare iyagoo aan tixgelinayn saxnaanta.
somali.if_ai_confidence_tracked_truth_dots_wo: Haddii kalsoonida AI ay raacdo runta, dhibcuhu waxay ku safan lahaayeen xariiqda weecsan ee dhibco leh.
somali.in_the_bottom_right_are_the_danger_zon: midig hoose waa aagga khatarta: waxay u muuqdaan kuwa hubaal ah, laakiin dhab ahaan khalad.
somali.look_identical_to_red_in_tone_that_s_t: u eg cas cod ahaan. Taasi waa qodobka ugu weyn ee casharka.
somali.you_can_t_tell_which_is_which_from_ins: Kama kala saari kartid kee kee ah gudaha AI. Kaliya hubinta dibadda ayaa shaqeysa.
somali.paste_any_ai_generated_text_from_here_: Ku dhaji qoraal kasta oo AI abuuray (halkan, chatbot kale, maqaal sheeganaya in AI qoray, iwm). Qalabku wuxuu
somali.kinds_of_red_flags_so_you_can_see_wher: iftiimiyaa noocyada calaamadaha digniinta si aad u aragto halka la hubinayo. Ma jiro wicitaan AI: tani waxay ku shaqeysaa qalabkaaga.
somali.paste_an_ai_response_here_to_see_which: Ku dhaji jawaab AI halkan si aad u aragto weedhaha u qalma eegis labaad...
somali.paste_ai_output_for_red_flag_analysis: Ku dhaji natiijada AI falanqaynta calaamadaha digniinta
somali.nothing_to_analyze_yet_paste_some_ai_g: Wax la falanqeeyo weli ma jiro. Ku dhaji qaar qoraal AI abuuray kor si aad u aragto weedhaha u baahan kara hubin.
somali.this_removes_all_saved_prompts_from_th: Tani waxay ka saartaa dhammaan amarrada la kaydiyay qaybtan. Ma dib u celin kartid.
somali.try_adding_i_am_a_9th_grader_studying_: Isku day inaad ku darto— "Waxaan ahay arday fasalka 9-aad oo baranaya..." — u sheeg AI wax ku saabsan adiga.
somali.try_adding_a_don_t_don_t_write_the_who: Ku dar mamnuucid— "Ha ii qorin qoraalka oo dhan." Xaddidaadyadu waxay hor istaagaan natiijooyin aan faa'iido lahayn.
somali.try_adding_a_format_give_me_a_3_step_l: Ku dar qaab— "I sii liis 3 tallaabo ah" ama "hal jumlad oo keliya" — waxay xakameysaa sida jawaabtu ugu faa'iido leedahay.
somali.try_adding_a_sample_here_s_one_i_did_e: Ku dar tusaale— "Kani waa mid aan sameeyay— [tusaale]. Samee kan xiga qaab isku mid ah."
somali.a_weak_prompt_gives_you_a_shallow_answ: Amar daciif ah wuxuu ku siinayaa jawaab gaaban si degdeg ah. Amar xoog leh wuxuu ku siinayaa jawaab faa'iido leh si isku mid ah oo degdeg ah. Farqigu waa xirfad — waana la baran karaa si fiican.
somali.here_is_one_strong_prompt_with_every_p: Halkan waa hal amar oo xoog leh oo qaab kasta lagu midab-koodeeyay. Dhig cursor-ka erey kasta si aad u aragto qaabka uu yahay.
somali.copy_to_use_in_your_own_ai_tool: Nuqul si aad u isticmaasho qalabka AI-gaaga
somali.pick_a_task_fill_in_the_blanks_you_ll_: Dooro hawl. Buuxi meelaha bannaan. Waxaad heli doontaa amar isticmaala dhammaan shanta qaab — iyaga oo aan la xafidin.
somali.load_into_the_workshop_below_to_run_it: Ku shubo aqoonsiga hoose si aad u socodsiiso toos ah ama u sii celceliso
somali.load_this_prompt_into_the_workshop_bel: Ku shubo amarkan aqoonsiga hoose si aad ugu socodsiiso Gemini
somali.copy_this_prompt_to_try_in_your_own_ai: Nuqul amarkan si aad ugu tijaabiso qalabka AI-gaaga
somali.run_both_prompts_at_the_same_time_and_: Socodsii labada amar isku mar oo isbarbardhig waxa Gemini abuurayo
somali.your_turn_iterate_a_prompt_live: Wareeggaaga: ku celceli amar toos ah
somali.write_a_prompt_below_run_it_look_at_th: Qor amar hoose. Socodsii. Eeg natiijada. Wax ka beddel amarka adigoo isticmaalaya shanta qaab. Mar kale socodsii. Waxaad isku dayeysaa inaad natiijada ka dhigto mid ka fiican — ama inaad fahamto sababta natiijadu u leedahay qaabkaas.
somali.try_explain_why_the_ocean_is_salty_to_: Isku day: "Sharrax sababta baddu u cusbaysan tahay arday fasalka 7-aad oo xiiseeya oo horay u yaqaan atam waa maxay. Ha dhaafin 4 jumladood."
somali.check_which_of_the_five_patterns_your_: Hubi qaabka amarkaagu isticmaalo shanta qaab (ma jiro wicitaan AI)
somali.copy_your_prompt_to_use_elsewhere: Nuqul amarkaaga si aad u isticmaasho meel kale
somali.live_ai_unavailable_the_critique_still: AI toos ah lama heli karo — dhaleeceyntu weli way shaqeysaa.
somali.this_critique_uses_keyword_heuristics_: Dhaleeceyntani waxay isticmaashaa qiyaasaha erayga muhiimka ah, ma aha AI. Waxay lumin kartaa weedhaha hal-abuurka. U isticmaal liis hubin, ma aha dhibco.
somali.nothing_saved_yet_every_successful_liv: Wax weli lama kaydin. Orod kasta oo tooska ah oo guuleystay waxaa halkan si toos ah loogu kaydiyaa. Waxaad sidoo kale ⭐ kaydin kartaa amar adiga oo aan socodsiin.
somali.the_audience_is_parents_who_don_t_have: Dhagaystayaashu waa waalidiin aan lahayn asal sayniska.
somali.output_as_3_bullet_points_max_20_words: U soo saar 3 qodob, mid kasta ugu badnaan 20 erey.
somali.for_instance_photosynthesis_is_how_pla: Tusaale ahaan: "Photosynthesis waa sida dhirtu u cunto iftiinka qorraxda."
somali.pretend_you_are_an_admissions_officer_: U yeel sidii adigoo ah sarkaal gelitaan oo kulliyad yar oo farshaxanka xorta ah.
somali.use_a_warm_but_professional_tone: Isticmaal cod diiran laakiin xirfad leh.
somali.the_parent_emailed_yesterday_asking_wh: Waalidku wuxuu iimayl diray shalay isagoo weydiinaya sababta ilmahoodu u jiro liiska kormeerka dhaqanka.
somali.example_output_your_essay_shows_strong: Natiijo tusaale: "Qoraalkaagu wuxuu muujinayaa cod xoog leh laakiin ma leh qaabdhismeed. Isku day…"
somali.you_will_see_12_phrases_pulled_from_re: Waxaad arki doontaa 12 weedhood oo laga soo qaaday amarro dhab ah. Mid kasta, dooro doorka qaabdhismeedka lixaad ee weedhu ciyaarto — shakhsi, hawl, macnaha guud, qaab, tusaale ama xaddid. Waxay tijaabineysaa haddii aad *falanqayn* karto amar sida shay halkii aad qori ama akhrin lahayd.
somali.reveal_one_error_using_any_hints_forfe: Muuji hal khalad. Isticmaalka tilmaan kasta wuxuu luminayaa abaalmarinta dhibcaha buuxa — laakiin way caawinaysaa haddii aad istaagto.
somali.hints_used_perfect_bonus_forfeited_on_: Tilmaamo la isticmaalay — abaalmarinta buuxa waa lumay isku daygan. Dib u dejii oo isku day mar kale tilmaan la'aan si aad u hesho.
somali.why_each_error_was_plausible: Sababta khalad kasta uu u ahaa mid la aamini karo
somali.pick_a_topic_you_know_well_write_a_sho: Dooro mawduuc aad si fiican u taqaan. Qor cutub gaaban oo qaab AI ah oo ku saabsan, laakiin ku duub 2–3 weedhood oo khaldan qaws laba ah, sidan
somali.trade_passages_with_someone_else_whoev: . Kula beddel cutubbada qof kale — qofka qabta dhammaan khaladaadka qawska gudihiisa wuu guuleysanayaa.
somali.your_draft_use_brackets_to_mark_errors: Qabyo-qoraalkaaga (isticmaal [[qaws]] si aad u calaamadiso khaladaadka)
somali.e_g_mitosis_has_four_main_phases_proph: Tusaale "Mitosis waxay leedahay afar wejiyada ugu waaweyn: prophase, metaphase, [[telophase]], iyo anaphase. Inta lagu jiro metaphase chromosomes waxay ku safan yihiin [[xariiqda xuubka nukleeska]] ka hor inta aysan kala go'in."
somali.good_trap_passages_have_2_3_seeded_err: Cutubbada dabinka ee wanaagsan waxay leeyihiin 2–3 khalad oo la beeray. Wax ka badan taas waxay u muuqataa cadaalad darro, ka yar aad ayay u fudud tahay. Bartilmaameedso khaladaadka u muuqda kuwo la aamini karo akhriska ugu horreeya.
somali.the_barrier_you_described_sounds_mecha: Caqabadda aad sharraxday waxay u muuqataa mid makaanik ah (qoraal gaabis ah, xusuusidda xusuusta, qaabaynta, abaabulka). Isticmaalka AI si loo saaro caqabaddaas ma aha sida ka dhigidda AI inuu sameeyo xirfadda lafteeda. Sii wad — laakiin fikirka aasaasiga ah gacantaada ku hay.
somali.the_barrier_is_cognitive_and_the_skill: Caqabaddu waa garasho iyo xirfadda aad magacowday waa nooca xirfadda uu dugsigu isku dayo inuu dhiso (fikir, curin, sabab bixin). Ka dhigidda AI inuu tan sameeyo waxay ka dhigan tahay inaad ka boodeyso tababarka. Ka fikir: Ma AI ayaa ku tababari kara xirfadda halkii uu adiga kuu samayn lahaa? Taasi waxay dib ugu bedeshaa taageero.
somali.the_barrier_is_cognitive_but_the_skill: Caqabaddu waa garasho laakiin xirfadda aad sharraxday laga yaabo inaanay ahayn tan halkan lagu tababarayo. Dib u akhri hawsha: waa maxay xirfadda gaarka ah ee ay dhab ahaan tijaabineyso? Isticmaal AI si aad u yareyso caqabadda xirfaddaas gaarka ah, ma aha inaad ku beddesho.
somali.the_question_is_not_is_ai_good_or_bad_: Su'aashu ma aha "AI wanaagsan yahay ama xun" — laakiin "Ma AI ayaa ka saaraya caqabad xirfadda aan ku tababarayo, mise waxay beddeleysaa xirfadda lafteeda?"
somali.before_you_use_ai_for_something_run_it: Ka hor inta aadan u isticmaalin AI wax, ku socodsii labadan su'aalood. Jawaabahu waxay u horseedaan mid ka mid ah saddex natiijo.
somali.what_specific_skill_is_this_task_meant: Waa maxay xirfadda gaarka ah ee hawshan loogu talagalay inay dhisto?
somali.is_ai_removing_a_barrier_to_that_skill: Ma AI ayaa ka saaraya caqabad xirfaddaas, mise waxay sameyneysaa xirfadda lafteeda?
somali.removes_barrier_go_ahead_keep_the_core: Waxay ka saartaa caqabad. Sii wad — fikirka aasaasiga ah gacantaada ku hay.
somali.can_ai_coach_you_through_the_skill_ins: Ma AI ayaa ku tababari kara xirfadda halkii uu samayn lahaa? Haddii haa — dib ugu qaabee taageero.
somali.doing_the_skill_itself_skipping_ai_her: Samaynta xirfadda lafteeda. Ka boodidda AI halkan waxay ilaalisaa tababarka aad u baahan tahay.
somali.use_ai_in_a_way_that_helps_you_do_the_: Isticmaal AI si kaa caawineysa inaad hawsha adiga samayso.
somali.use_ai_to_do_the_work_for_you: Isticmaal AI si uu hawsha kuu sameeyo.
somali.now_compare_both_worked_versions_there: . Hadda isbarbardhig labada nooc ee la sameeyay — ma jiro doorasho "khaldan", kaliya fikir cad oo ku saabsan waxa xirfaddu dhab ahaan tahay.
somali.why_this_one_matters: 🔬 Sababta tani ay muhiim u tahay
somali.the_five_scenarios_above_are_common_bu: Shanta xaaladood ee kor ku xusan way caadi yihiin laakiin su'aasha dhabta ah had iyo jeer waxay ku saabsan tahay wakhtigaaga gaarka ah. Sharrax arrintaada, magacaw xirfadda, oo magacaw caqabadda. Waxaad heli doontaa jiho — ma aha jawaab.
somali.e_g_i_have_a_biology_lab_report_due_fr: Tusaale "Waxaan hayaa warbixin makhad bayoloji ah oo la gudbinayo Jimcaha oo ma awoodo inaan diirad saaro muddo ku filan si aan u qoro hordhaca."
somali.e_g_writing_a_scientific_intro_that_st: Tusaale "Qoritaanka hordhac sayniska ah oo sheega mala-awaal"
somali.name_the_skill_this_assignment_is_prac: Magacaw xirfadda uu hawlgalkan ku tababarayo
somali.3_what_kind_of_barrier_is_in_the_way: 3. Nooc caqabad ah ayaa jira jidka?
somali.live_ai_unavailable_here_the_heuristic: AI toos ah lama heli karo halkan — jihada qiyaaska kor waxay isticmaashaa jawaabahaaga kaliya, ma jiro wicitaan AI.
somali.to_print_other_ui_hides_automatically: si loo daabaco; UI kale wuu isqariyaa si toos ah.
somali.download_a_markdown_report_of_your_pro: Soo dejiso warbixin Markdown ah oo horumarkaaga, hubinta aad gudubtay, iyo amarrada aad kaydisay. Sii macallin.

somali.controls_how_random_the_pick_is: wuxuu xakameeyaa sida doorashadu u kala qaybsan tahay
somali.it_has_no_idea_what_s_true_only_what_s: Wax fikrad ah kama haysto waxa "run" ah — kaliya waxa la aamini karo
somali.fake_citations_verify_with_google_scho: Tixraacyo been ah (ku xaqiiji Google Scholar)
somali.fills_gaps_with_plausible_stories: : wuxuu buuxiyaa daldaloolka sheekooyin la aamini karo
somali.it_sounds_confident_exactly_the_same_w: Waxay u muuqataa kalsooni si isku mid ah, ha ahaato sax ama khalad
somali.does_the_answer_cite_anything_verify_e: Ma jawaabtu wax tixraacaysaa? Xaqiiji tixraac kasta.
somali.is_it_past_the_model_s_cutoff_use_web_: Ma xadka moodalka ka dambeeyaa? Isticmaal raadinta web haddii haa.
somali.any_math_redo_it_with_a_calculator: Xisaab kasta? Dib u samee xisaabiye.
somali.sound_too_confident_ask_are_you_sure_w: U muuqata kalsooni aad u badan? Weydii "Ma hubtaa?" — eeg haddii jawaabtu isbeddesho.
somali.ai_removes_a_barrier_so_you_can_do_the: AI wuxuu ka saaraa caqabad si aad u samayso xirfadda. (I tijaabi. Habee fikradahayga. I weydii su'aalo.)
somali.ai_does_the_skill_for_you_write_my_ess: AI wuxuu kuu sameeyaa xirfadda. (Ii qor qoraalkeyga. Ii xalli dhibaatadayda. Soo koob halkii aad akhrin lahayd.)
somali.ask_what_skill_is_this_assignment_real: Weydii: "Waa maxay xirfadda uu hawlgalkani dhab ahaan tijaabinayo?" Kadibna gacantaada ku hay.
somali.i_am_a_grade_student_don_t_solve_this_: "Waxaan ahay arday fasalka [fasal]. Ha ii xallin tan — i weydii su'aalo i caawiya inaan helo jawaabta."
somali.quiz_me_on_topic_one_question_at_a_tim: "I tijaabi [mawduuc] hal su'aal mar. Sug jawaabtayda ka hor inta aadan weydiinin kan xiga."
somali.are_you_certain_this_event_actually_ha: "Ma hubtaa in dhacdadan dhab ahaan dhacday? Tixraac il."
somali.explain_concept_using_only_middle_scho: "Sharrax [fikrad] adigoo isticmaalaya kaliya erey-bixinta dugsiga dhexe. Ma jiraan erayo farsamo."

somali.back_to_ai_literacy_lab_home: Ku noqo guriga Makhadka Aqoonta AI
somali.pick_another_answer_to_try_again: Dooro jawaab kale si aad u isku dayto mar kale.
somali.low_stakes_high_familiarity_high_sourc: Khatar hooseysa, aqoonsi sare, tayada il sare. Hubinta random weli waa caado wanaagsan laakiin waad ku kalsoonaan kartaa natiijada.
somali.trust_most_of_it_but_check_one_or_two_: Aamin inteeda badan, laakiin hubi hal ama laba sheegasho oo muhiim ah oo ka soo horjeeda il awood leh ka hor intaadan ficil qaadin.
somali.treat_as_draft_every_concrete_claim_nu: U qaad qabyo-qoraal ahaan. Sheegasho kasta oo la taaban karo (tiro, magac, tixraac) waxay u baahan tahay xaqiijin madax-bannaan.
somali.high_stakes_or_low_source_quality_use_: Khatar sare ama tayo il hoose. Isticmaal kaliya maskax-shaqeynta; ha soo bandhigin natiijo AI ah sida jawaabta ugu dambeysa.
somali.medical_diagnosis_legal_advice_citing_: Baaritaan caafimaad, talo sharci, tixraacidda ilaha aasaasiga ah oo aadan xaqiijin karin — qalab khaldan hawsha. Isticmaal khabiir bini'aadam ah ama il awood leh.
somali.trust_calibration_how_much_should_i_tr: 🔬 Qiyaas-hagaajinta kalsoonida — intee ayaan aaminaa natiijadan?
somali.set_task_familiarity_stakes_source_qua: Dejii aqoonsiga hawsha, khatarta, tayada il, iyo kalsoonida uu moodalku ku dhawaaqay. Qiyaas halka kala duwanaanshaha kalsoonida ku dhaco. Ma jiro dhibco, ma jiro soo bandhigid.
somali.green_red_safer_to_use: Cagaaran > cas = ammaan in la isticmaalo
somali.your_hypothesis_which_slider_should_we: Mala-awaalkaaga (slider-kee ayaa lahaan kara miisaanka ugu badan kala duwanaanshaha? Ma kalsoonida la ku dhawaaqay ku habboon tahay halkan?)
somali.e_g_stakes_should_dominate_everything_: Tusaale, khatartu waa inay wax kasta xukunto — kalsooni leh laakiin khalad khatar hoose < aan hubin laakiin sax khatar sare...
somali.why_does_your_familiarity_matter_what_: Sababta aqoonsigaagu u muhiim yahay? Waa maxay waxa moodalku garan waayo oo adigu garan karto?
somali.when_llms_report_95_confidence_what_do: Marka LLM soo sheegaan kalsooni 95%, maxay dhab ahaan la macno tahay? Ma la qiyaas-hagaajiyay?
somali.when_should_you_never_use_an_llm_regar: Goorma ayaadan waligaa isticmaali karin LLM iyada oo aan loo eegin tayada il?
somali.how_would_your_trust_threshold_differ_: Sidee ayay heerka kalsoonidaadu ugu kala duwanaan lahayd caddayn xisaabeed vs qoraal hal-abuur ah vs tixraac?
somali.i_can_explain_why_this_combination_yie: Waan sharrixi karaa sababta isku-darkani u dhaliyo xaaladdan kalsoonida.
somali.inquiry_widget_no_score_no_reveal_no_a: Widget baaris — ma jiro dhibco, ma jiro soo bandhigid, ma jiro jawaab la bixiyo. Qaaciddada kalsoonidu waa qiyaas, ma aha qaab la daabacay. LLM si fiican looma qiyaas-hagaajin — kalsoonida la ku dhawaaqay inta badan way ka leexataa saxnaanta. Xaqiiji natiijooyinka khatarta sare had iyo jeer oo ka soo horjeeda ilaha awoodda leh.
somali.ai_literacy_lab_main_content: Nuxurka ugu weyn Makhadka Aqoonta AI
somali.something_went_wrong_rendering_this_se: Wax baa qaldamay markii la muujinayay qaybtan. Hubi console-ka faahfaahin.
